title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick — Page 738
raw_text:
VALIS (e.g.) is heart, human, life.
I passed through progressive humanization and humanized stages in my
writing as I did so in my actual life.
 
[77:G-11]
There is no truth in this, only artistic vision: but for me, in terms of my own
vision, "truth" (objectively) has no meaning; to state that X is "truth" would
violate the premise of my own vision. Thus VALIS was inexorably
dictated/generated by my total corpus.
work_title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick
